# Frequency Sweep

**Summary**: A dynamic test to investigate time-dependent viscoelastic properties of a fluid.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-basfar|BASFAR, 2018]] performed frequency sweep tests to evaluate the damping function (tan delta).
